exam_price_notes: AACN member price $280. Non-member price $430. Administered by BCEN.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based testing at PSI test centers for most AACN exams.
Pearson VUE test centers available for select AACN credentials.

id_requirements: One government-issued photo ID with full name and signature. Name must match AACN registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials permitted. Linear computer-based exam. Unscored pretest items are distributed randomly throughout the exam.
renewal_options: Earn 100 CERPs (Continuing Education Recognition Points) every 5 years including required clinical practice hours, OR retake and pass the certification exam. Annual maintenance fee applies.

prerequisites.description: 2 years of trauma nursing experience and 1,750 hours of trauma nursing practice within the past 2 years

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between attempts. Full exam fee required for each retake attempt.

official_study_resources.title: AACN Certification Exam Handbooks
official_study_resources.notes: Official exam handbooks with test blueprints available on the AACN website

official_study_resources.title: AACN Online Practice Exams
official_study_resources.notes: AACN offers official online practice exams for most credentials
